CustomField.formula:
IF( (ISBLANK(BI_Data__r.First_MQL2_Date__c) || (Datevalue(BI_Data__r.First_MQL2_Date__c) < date(2018,09,01)) && Isblank(LastActivityDate)), '',
IF( (LastActivityDate-DATEVALUE(BI_Data__r.MQL2_Date__c) >= -14) || (((ISBLANK(BI_Data__r.MQL2_Date__c ) && LastActivityDate - DATEVALUE(BI_Data__r.First_MQL2_Date__c) >=- 14)) || (datevalue( BI_Data__r.First_MQL2_Date__c) < date(2018,09,01))), 'Followed Up','Neglected'))
CustomField.label: Neglected MQL2?
